FUNCTION.SQL: SELECT C_WEEKEND,C_WEEKEND_DESC FROM %EXIMSYS%.STT_WEEKEND WHERE C_BK_GROUP_ID=''{0}'' AND C_CNTY_CODE=''{1}''
SELECT C_WEEKEND,C_WEEKEND_DESC FROM %EXIMSYS%.STT_WEEKEND WHERE C_BK_GROUP_ID=''{0}'' AND C_CNTY_CODE=''{1}''
SELECT C_WEEKEND,C_WEEKEND_DESC FROM %EXIMSYS%.STT_WEEKEND WHERE C_BK_GROUP_ID=''{0}'' AND C_CNTY_CODE=''{1}''
SELECT C_CURRENCY_CODE,C_DATE,C_MONTH,C_NAME,C_TYPE,C_DESC FROM %EXIMSYS%.STT_HOLIDAY WHERE C_BK_GROUP_ID=''{0}'' AND C_CNTY_CODE=''{1}'' AND (C_YEAR=''{2}'' OR C_YEAR='0000') AND C_SUB_CNTY=''{3}''
SELECT C_CURRENCY_CODE,C_DATE,C_MONTH,C_NAME,C_TYPE,C_DESC FROM %EXIMSYS%.STT_HOLIDAY WHERE C_BK_GROUP_ID=''{0}'' AND C_CNTY_CODE=''{1}'' AND (C_YEAR=''{2}'' OR C_YEAR='0000') AND C_SUB_CNTY=''{3}''
SELECT C_CURRENCY_CODE,C_DATE,C_MONTH,C_NAME,C_TYPE,C_DESC FROM %EXIMSYS%.STT_HOLIDAY WHERE C_BK_GROUP_ID=''{0}'' AND C_CNTY_CODE=''{1}'' AND (C_YEAR=''{2}'' OR C_YEAR='0000') AND C_SUB_CNTY=''{3}''
SELECT C_COUNTRY,C_SWIFT_CODE,C_MAJOR_NAME,C_MINOR_NAME,I_DECIMAL,I_BASE_DAY,I_RATE_DECIMAL,C_CCY_DESC,C_DATA_SOURCE FROM %EXIMSYS%.STT_CURRENCY WHERE C_CURRENCY=''{0}''
SELECT C_COUNTRY,C_SWIFT_CODE,C_MAJOR_NAME,C_MINOR_NAME,I_DECIMAL,I_BASE_DAY,I_RATE_DECIMAL,C_CCY_DESC,C_DATA_SOURCE FROM %EXIMSYS%.STT_CURRENCY WHERE C_CURRENCY=''{0}''
SELECT C_COUNTRY,C_SWIFT_CODE,C_MAJOR_NAME,C_MINOR_NAME,I_DECIMAL,I_BASE_DAY,I_RATE_DECIMAL,C_CCY_DESC,C_DATA_SOURCE FROM %EXIMSYS%.STT_CURRENCY WHERE C_CURRENCY=''{0}''

SELECT C_DESC_ID,C_MD_FLAG,F_VALUE,F_TOLERANCE,PRICE_DATE,C_RATE_STATE,I_BASE_UNITS,D_VALUE_DATE,C_EXCH_INT_TYPE FROM %EXIMSYS%.STT_EXCHAN_RATE WHERE C_BK_GROUP_ID = ''{0}'' AND C_CNTY_CODE = ''{1}'' AND C_FROM_CCY = ''{2}'' AND C_TO_CCY = ''{3}''

SELECT C_DESC_ID,C_MD_FLAG,F_VALUE,F_TOLERANCE,PRICE_DATE,C_RATE_STATE,I_BASE_UNITS,D_VALUE_DATE,C_EXCH_INT_TYPE FROM %EXIMSYS%.STT_EXCHAN_RATE WHERE C_BK_GROUP_ID = ''{0}'' AND C_CNTY_CODE = ''{1}'' AND C_FROM_CCY = ''{2}'' AND C_TO_CCY = ''{3}''

SELECT C_DESC_ID,C_MD_FLAG,F_VALUE,F_TOLERANCE,PRICE_DATE,C_RATE_STATE,I_BASE_UNITS,D_VALUE_DATE,C_EXCH_INT_TYPE FROM %EXIMSYS%.STT_EXCHAN_RATE WHERE C_BK_GROUP_ID = ''{0}'' AND C_CNTY_CODE = ''{1}'' AND C_FROM_CCY = ''{2}'' AND C_TO_CCY = ''{3}''
SELECT * FROM %EXIMSYS%.STT_AC_NUMBER WHERE C_AC_NUMBER = ''{0}'' AND C_BK_GROUP_ID = ''{1}'' AND C_CNTY_CODE = ''{2}'' AND C_CURRENCY = ''{3}''
SELECT * FROM %EXIMSYS%.STT_AC_NUMBER WHERE C_AC_NUMBER = ''{0}'' AND C_BK_GROUP_ID = ''{1}'' AND C_CNTY_CODE = ''{2}'' AND C_CURRENCY = ''{3}''
SELECT * FROM %EXIMSYS%.STT_AC_NUMBER WHERE C_AC_NUMBER = ''{0}'' AND C_BK_GROUP_ID = ''{1}'' AND C_CNTY_CODE = ''{2}'' AND C_CURRENCY = ''{3}''
SELECT C_BK_GROUP_ID,C_CNTY_CODE,C_UNIT_CODE,LM_ACNT_OFFI FROM %EXIMSYS%.LMTS_ACNT WHERE LM_ACNT_ID = ''{0}''

SELECT T1.C_BK_GROUP_ID,T1.C_CNTY_CODE,T1.C_UNIT_CODE,T1.LM_CSL_DESC,T2.LM_REVV_FLAG FROM %EXIMSYS%.STDS_CSLD T1 LEFT JOIN %EXIMSYS%.STDS_CSL T2 ON T1.LM_CSL_ID = T2.LM_CSL_ID WHERE T1.LM_CSL_ID = ''{0}''

SELECT T1.C_BK_GROUP_ID,T1.C_CNTY_CODE,T1.C_UNIT_CODE,T1.LM_FACI_TP,T1.LM_RISK_TP,T2.LM_REVV_FLAG FROM %EXIMSYS%.STDS_FACI T1 LEFT JOIN %EXIMSYS%.STDS_CSFL T2 ON T1.LM_FACI_ID = T2.LM_FACI_ID WHERE T1.LM_FACI_ID = ''{0}''
SELECT * FROM %EXIMSYS%.STDS_PARA WHERE C_BK_GROUP_ID = ''{0}'' AND C_CNTY_CODE = ''{1}'' AND C_UNIT_CODE = ''{2}''
SELECT C_BK_GROUP_ID,C_CNTY_CODE,C_UNIT_CODE,LM_CUST_ID,LM_RCUST_ID,LM_BASE_CCY,LM_IS_USED,LM_CANBE_USE,LM_SPEC_LMT,LM_USED_LMT FROM %EXIMSYS%.STDS_ALLO WHERE LM_TRX_REF = ''{0}''
SELECT C_BK_GROUP_ID,C_CNTY_CODE,C_UNIT_CODE,LM_INDU_NAME FROM %EXIMSYS%.STDS_INDU WHERE LM_INDU_ID = ''{0}''
SELECT C_BK_GROUP_ID, C_CNTY_CODE, C_UNIT_CODE, LM_CRT_DAY, LM_STR_DAY, LM_DUE_DAY, LM_BASE_CCY, LM_CRED_LMT, LM_STATUS, LM_REVV_FLAG, LM_ALLW_LMT FROM %EXIMSYS%.STDS_GCL WHERE LM_GRUP_ID = ''{0}''

SELECT C_BK_GROUP_ID,C_CNTY_CODE,C_UNIT_CODE,LM_CRT_DAY,LM_STR_DAY,LM_DUE_DAY,LM_CUST_NAME,LM_CRED_LMT,LM_BASE_CCY,LM_STATUS,LM_REVV_FLAG,LM_EDIT_REASN,LM_ALLW_LMT,LM_SUBLIMIT FROM %EXIMSYS%.STDS_CCL WHERE LM_CUST_ID = ''{0}'' AND LM_RCUST_ID= ''{1}''

SELECT T1.LM_CSL_ID AS $STDS_CSL_LM_CSL_ID$,T1.C_BK_GROUP_ID AS $STDS_CSL_C_BK_GROUP_ID$,T1.C_CNTY_CODE AS $STDS_CSL_C_CNTY_CODE$,T1.C_UNIT_CODE AS $STDS_CSL_C_UNIT_CODE$,T1.LM_HAS_FACI AS $STDS_CSL_LM_HAS_FACI$,T1.LM_CSL_DESC AS $STDS_CSL_LM_CSL_DESC$,T1.LM_CRT_DAY AS $STDS_CSL_LM_CRT_DAY$,T1.LM_STR_DAY AS $STDS_CSL_LM_STR_DAY$,T1.LM_DUE_DAY AS $STDS_CSL_LM_DUE_DAY$,T3.LM_CUST_NAME AS $STDS_CCL_LM_CUST_NAME$,T1.LM_CRED_LMT AS $STDS_CSL_LM_CRED_LMT$,T1.LM_SUB_CCY AS $STDS_CSL_LM_SUB_CCY$,T1.LM_STATUS AS $STDS_CSL_LM_STATUS$,T1.LM_STYPE AS $STDS_CSL_LM_STYPE$,T1.LM_REVV_FLAG AS $STDS_CSL_LM_REVV_FLAG$,T1.LM_EDIT_REASN AS $STDS_CSL_LM_EDIT_REASN$,T5.LM_ACNT_OFFI AS $STDS_ACNT_LM_ACNT_OFFI$,T6.LM_INDU_NAME AS $STDS_INDU_LM_INDU_NAME$,T1.LM_ALLW_LMT AS $STDS_CSL_LM_ALLW_LMT$,T2.C_BK_GROUP_ID AS $STDS_CSFL_C_BK_GROUP_ID$,T2.C_CNTY_CODE AS $STDS_CSFL_C_CNTY_CODE$,T2.C_UNIT_CODE AS $STDS_CSFL_C_UNIT_CODE$,T2.LM_CRT_DAY AS $STDS_CSFL_LM_CRT_DAY$,T2.LM_STR_DAY AS $STDS_CSFL_LM_STR_DAY$,T2.LM_DUE_DAY AS $STDS_CSFL_LM_DUE_DAY$,T2.LM_CUST_ID AS $STDS_CSFL_LM_CUST_ID$,T3.LM_CUST_NAME AS $STDS_CSFL_LM_CUST_NAME$,T2.LM_RCUST_ID AS $STDS_CSFL_LM_RCUST_ID$,T4.LM_FACI_TP AS $STDS_FACI_LM_FACI_TP$,T2.LM_CRED_LMT AS $STDS_CSFL_LM_CRED_LMT$,T4.LM_FAC_CCY AS $STDS_FACI_LM_FAC_CCY$,T2.LM_STATUS AS $STDS_CSFL_LM_STATUS$,T2.LM_REVV_FLAG AS $STDS_CSFL_LM_REVV_FLAG$,T5.LM_ACNT_OFFI AS $STDS_CSFL_LM_ACNT_OFFI$,T6.LM_INDU_NAME AS $STDS_CSFL_LM_INDU_NAME$,T2.LM_ALLW_LMT AS $STDS_CSFL_LM_ALLW_LMT$,T2.LM_FACI_ID AS $STDS_CSFL_LM_FACI_ID$ FROM %EXIMSYS%.STDS_CSL T1 LEFT JOIN %EXIMSYS%.STDS_CSFL T2 ON T1.LM_CSL_ID = T2.LM_CSL_ID LEFT JOIN %EXIMSYS%.STDS_CCL T3 ON T1.LM_CUST_ID = T3.LM_CUST_ID AND T1.LM_RCUST_ID = T3.LM_RCUST_ID LEFT JOIN %EXIMSYS%.STDS_ACNT T5 ON T1.LM_ACNT_ID = T5.LM_ACNT_ID LEFT JOIN %EXIMSYS%.STDS_INDU T6 ON T1.LM_INDU_ID = T6.LM_INDU_ID LEFT JOIN %EXIMSYS%.STDS_FACI T4 ON T2.LM_FACI_ID = T4.LM_FACI_ID WHERE T1.LM_CSL_ID = ''{0}''

FIELD.SQL: SELECT LM_CUST_NAME FROM %EXIMSYS%.STDS_CCL WHERE LM_CUST_ID = ''{0}'' AND LM_RCUST_ID = ''{1}''

FUNCTION.SQL: SELECT C_BK_GROUP_ID,C_CNTY_CODE,C_UNIT_CODE,LM_COSH_NAME,LM_BASE_CCY,LM_CRED_LMT,LM_STATUS,LM_ALLW_LMT,LM_CRT_DAY,LM_STR_DAY,LM_DUE_DAY FROM %EXIMSYS%.STDS_COSH WHERE LM_COSH_ID = ''{0}''
SELECT * FROM %EXIMSYS%.STD_ACCOUNT_TYPE WHERE C_BK_GROUP_ID = ''{0}'' AND C_CNTY_CODE = ''{1}'' AND C_ACTY_NAME = ''{2}''
SELECT C_UNIT_CODE,IA_C_PARA_VALUE,IA_C_PARA_DESC FROM %EXIMSYS%.STD_ELOAN_PARA WHERE C_BK_GROUP_ID = ''{0}'' AND C_CNTY_CODE = ''{1}'' AND IA_C_PARA_NAME = ''{2}''

SELECT T1.I_TIER_DAY1,T1.I_TIER_DAY2,T1.I_TIER_DAY3,T1.I_TIER_DAY4,T1.I_TIER_DAY5,T1.I_TIER_DAY6,T1.I_TIER_DAY7,T1.I_TIER_DAY8,T2.D_VAL_DATE,T2.N_RAT_VAL1,T2.N_RAT_VAL2,T2.N_RAT_VAL3,T2.N_RAT_VAL4,T2.N_RAT_VAL5,T2.N_RAT_VAL6,T2.N_RAT_VAL7,T2.N_RAT_VAL8 FROM %EXIMSYS%.STD_RATE_TABLE T1,%EXIMSYS%.STD_RATE_VALUE T2 WHERE T1.C_RATE_ID = T2.C_RATE_ID AND T1.C_BK_GROUP_ID = ''{0}'' AND T1.C_CNTY_CODE = ''{1}'' AND T1.C_RATE_ID = ''{2}''
